phases.name: Core Gateway Infrastructure
phases.description: GatewayManager, asyncio Queue, and BaseAdapter setup — the backbone for all platform adapters.

tasks.name: GatewayManager with asyncio.Queue
tasks.description: Central message bus that routes inbound messages from adapters to the agent brain.

tasks.name: BaseAdapter abstract class
tasks.description: Interface every platform adapter must implement (send, _poll, start, stop).

tasks.name: Universal Message Format (UMF)
tasks.description: Normalized Message dataclass with sender_id, content, platform, metadata.

tasks.name: Singleton GatewayManager (get_gateway)
tasks.description: Global gateway instance accessible from any module.

tasks.name: Gateway Monitor view in Web UI
tasks.description: Dashboard tab showing adapter status, queue log, and start/stop toggles.

phases.name: Telegram Polling Adapter
phases.description: Stable, headless Telegram integration that works behind NAT with no tunnels, no webhooks, no public IP.

tasks.name: TelegramAdapter with getUpdates polling
tasks.description: Background task that long-polls Telegram's getUpdates API every 1s.

tasks.name: Token from env + config
tasks.description: Reads TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN from env or kazma.yaml.

tasks.name: Connectivity check on start (getMe)
tasks.description: Verifies the bot token is valid before starting the poll loop.

tasks.name: Error recovery & reconnection
tasks.description: Exponential backoff on connection loss, auto-restart polling.

phases.name: Unified Agent Logic (Queue Consumer)
phases.description: The agent brain consumes from the gateway queue instead of routing webhooks directly.

tasks.name: Gateway consumer background task
tasks.description: asyncio task that calls gateway.consume() and feeds messages to agent.run().

tasks.name: send_message() tool uses gateway.send()
tasks.description: Agent's send_message tool routes replies via the gateway's platform-aware send().

tasks.name: Session mapping via sender_id
tasks.description: Map sender_id to Kazma thread_id for conversation continuity.

tasks.name: Deprecate telegram_bridge.py webhooks
tasks.description: Remove old tunnel-based webhook code once polling is stable.

phases.name: Expansion (Discord / WhatsApp)
phases.description: Adding new platform adapters using the BaseAdapter interface — each takes ~1 day.

tasks.name: Discord adapter (gateway bot)
tasks.description: Discord.py-based adapter using intents for message events.

tasks.name: WhatsApp adapter (Cloud API)
tasks.description: WhatsApp Business API webhook consumer (requires public URL for webhook).

tasks.name: Slack adapter (Socket Mode)
tasks.description: Slack Socket Mode — no public URL needed, like Telegram polling.

tasks.name: Adapter auto-discovery
tasks.description: Gateway scans config for enabled adapters and starts them automatically.
